longDescription: Run a beautiful, accurate internet speed test right from your Ulanzi Deck. Press a key to measure download and upload with a real speedtest.net client (speedtest-go) — the same methodology as Ookla — shown on animated concentric neon rings. Add the Ping action for true latency at a glance. Configurable units (Mbps / MB/s), an optional contracted-plan scale so the gauge fills to your plan, and optional auto-run interval.
